message:
fix(session): harden session store with cycle detection, duplicate guards, index rebuild error propagation, and strict u64 parsing

A collection of defensive hardening changes across the session store V2
subsystem and session index.

session_store_v2.rs:
- Add open_for_inspection() constructor that opens a store handle for
  read-only validation without triggering bootstrap recovery, used by
  migration_status() to safely probe store health
- read_active_path(): detect duplicate entry_ids in the offset index and
  return an error instead of silently using the last occurrence
- read_active_path(): detect cyclic parent chains using a visited set and
  return an error instead of looping forever
- read_active_path(): verify frame.entry_id matches the index row's entry_id
  to catch index/frame mismatches from corruption
- rebuild_index_inner(): replace silent truncate-and-quarantine behavior for
  oversized lines with explicit error propagation so callers can decide
  recovery strategy
- rebuild_index_inner(): reject mid-segment parse failures (non-EOF) with
  explicit errors instead of silently truncating

session_index.rs:
- Add sqlite_u64_from_i64() helper that returns an error for negative values
  instead of silently coercing them to 0 via unwrap_or
- row_to_meta() uses the new helper for message_count and size_bytes so
  corrupted/negative values are caught at read time
- Two new unit tests: list_sessions_errors_on_negative_message_count,
  list_sessions_errors_on_negative_size_bytes
- Property test updated to expect errors for negative values instead of
  accepting silent coercion

session.rs:
- migration_status() now uses open_for_inspection() + read_index() to
  probe store health before falling back to full create()
- Add migration_status_can_rebuild_index() helper that classifies which
  read_index errors are recoverable (JSON parse, unexpected EOF, invalid data)
- When index is rebuildable, run verify_v2_against_jsonl() to confirm
  entry counts, hash chains, and index consistency before declaring Migrated

tests/session_store_v2.rs:
- New tests for duplicate entry_id detection, cyclic parent chain detection,
  and index/frame entry_id mismatch detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
